channel.title: Infrastructure on ThaiCySec - Cybersecurity Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Infrastructure on ThaiCySec - Cybersecurity Blog

item.title: Security by Obscurity, by hiding ports, framework or platform name and versions at which extended? Practical or Operational Hell?
item.description: How far should we go hiding versions, frameworks, and platform details from attackers before security hardening becomes operational pain?
